title: Smoky Guacamole
description: A creamy, smoky twist on traditional guacamole. Perfect for a snack or appetizer.

ingredients.name: Avocado
ingredients.notes: Ripe avocados are essential for the creamiest guacamole.

ingredients.name: Lime juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Smoky
ingredients.notes: Smoky adds a depth of flavor to balance out the creaminess.

ingredients.name: Guac
ingredients.notes: Guac adds a tangy, slightly sweet flavor.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Add salt to bring out the flavors of the other ingredients.

ingredients.name: Cilantro
ingredients.notes: Fresh cilantro adds a nice pop of color and flavor.

instructions: Cut the avocados in half and remove the pit.
Scoop the avocado flesh into a large mixing bowl.
Add the lime juice, smoky, guac, salt, and cilantro to the bowl with the avocado.
Use a fork to mash the ingredients together until you reach your desired consistency.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and let it sit at room temperature for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the guacamole with tortilla chips, on tacos, or as a dip for vegetables.
